title: Richard Sanders
compiled_truth: Richard Sanders is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-07), Richard Sanders sent 3153 and received 2006 emails, totalling 5159 interactions.
